raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Settle in","name":"Before we get into anything specific, what would be most useful to talk through today?","description":"Gives Kenji control over the agenda before any concern is introduced.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"landing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Moving target","name":"What part of the expectations for your role still feels like a moving target?","description":"Surfaces where the bar is unclear or keeps shifting in practice.","purpose":"topic","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Support access","name":"When you need help, what usually makes it easy or hard to ask for it here?","description":"Tests whether the team setup makes support feel safe and usable.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Recent friction","name":"What has been the most frustrating part of the work lately?","description":"Lets him name the current friction without assuming the source.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Confidence check","name":"Where has your confidence felt strongest or weakest in the last few weeks?","description":"Explores the confidence dip directly without turning it into a diagnosis.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Requirement churn","name":"What keeps getting reprioritized in a way that changes your design work?","description":"Surfaces churn from shifting requirements and how it affects his focus.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision pressure","name":"Where do you feel most pressure to prove yourself in the work?","description":"Reveals the situations where he may be overextending or self-censoring.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Team setup","name":"What part of the team setup makes your role harder than it needs to be?","description":"Identifies structural friction that the manager can help remove.","purpose":"topic","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next support","name":"What would make the next two weeks feel more manageable for you?","description":"Turns the conversation toward concrete support and near-term relief.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Takeaway","name":"What's the first concrete thing you want to have changed by our next conversation?","description":"Closes on a specific next step without opening a new thread.","purpose":"competency","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
